hero.tagline: A precision metronome for serious practice, with low-latency native audio.

description.title: Precision you can feel
paragraphs: Cadence Metronome is a precision metronome built on a native C++ audio engine. Unlike apps that suffer from latency and jitter, here every beat lands exactly when it should — a rock-solid foundation for serious practice.

But it's more than a steady click. Set time signatures and subdivisions, build practice sequences with tempo ramps and pauses, save your setups as presets, and track your progress with session history.
All in a clean, considered interface, with handcrafted themes, original sounds and haptic feedback. It works offline and collects no data: the app is yours and no one else's.

lowLatency.title: Low-latency audio
lowLatency.description: Native C++ engine (FFI) for beats with no jitter or delay, on Android too.

tapTempo.title: BPM dial & Tap Tempo
tapTempo.description: From 20 to 300 BPM with an intuitive dial and tap tempo with smart averaging.

timeSignatures.title: Time signatures & subdivisions
timeSignatures.description: Set time signatures (4/4, 3/4, 6/8…) and subdivisions with custom accents.

sequencer.title: Practice sequencer
sequencer.description: Chain measures with tempo ramps, pauses and fermatas for structured rehearsals.

themes.title: Handcrafted themes
themes.description: Neon, Cyber, Chrome, Zen and Material You support. Your metronome, your look.

sounds.title: Sounds & presets
sounds.description: Original sounds for different moods and presets to load your favorite setups.

history.title: Practice history
history.description: A local log of your sessions to see your habits and progress over time.

privacy.title: Private & offline
privacy.description: Works without internet, in Spanish and English, and collects no data.

availability.title: Coming soon to the stores
availability.note: Cadence Metronome is on its way to the App Store and Google Play. Check back soon to download it.

guides.title: Want to get the most out of it?
guides.description: Short, practical guides to master tap tempo, accents and subdivisions.
